contract.title: Financial Services-BNY Mellon
contract.contract_type: Purchasing Contract – OCA Approval NOT Required
contract.purchasing_authority: No purchasing authority in legacy system

spend_by_fy.note: Vouchers joined on contract_number — payment detail begins FY2018 (PeopleSoft migration; contract numbers change at the break). SF fiscal year N runs July 1 (N−1) to June 30 N.

team.supplier: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON

team_note: Attached amounts for subcontractors and JV members live inside the prime's envelope — they are context, never additive with the contract's own amounts.
